query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS patient_invitations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  physician_id INT NOT NULL,
  patient_email VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  patient_name VARCHAR(256),
  invitation_token VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  status ENUM('pending', 'accepted', 'expired') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  expires_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  accepted_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (physician_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);
